missions.name: Preliminary Asset Evaluation
missions.briefing: Per current portfolio review, the Society requires preliminary photometric data on a candidate body. Standard pass: deploy probe, hold standoff, capture telemetry, file to the desk on close. Several assets are under simultaneous review this cycle. Clean data advances yours in queue.

missions.name: Phase II Verification Scan
missions.briefing: Subject body has cleared preliminary screening. Phase II photometric pass required at extraction-grade precision: standoff tighter, hold longer, variance window narrower. Phase II compensation rates apply on close. Stakeholders are watching this one.
